title: On My Way to the Crusades, I Met a Girl Who...
writer: Ugo Liberatore, Luigi Magni, Larry Gelbart
actors: Tony Curtis, Monica Vitti, Ivo Garrani
plot: The knight Guerrando is forced to leave for the Crusades before he's had time to consummate his marriage with the beautiful Boccadoro. According to the custom of the period, Guerrando applies the chastity belt to the bride.
